issues.details: pHash similarity between source header-desktop.png and migrated preview header strip is 0.567, below the 0.75 threshold. Difference is expected: source site uses full Juvéderm brand CSS/images; EDS preview at Phase 5 uses boilerplate styling before custom CSS is applied. Header has real, non-empty content (12 links confirmed).
issues.remediation: Apply custom CSS/branding in later phases. This is a styling gap, not a content gap.

issues.details: Source footer contained 'Cookies settings' (#onetrust) link; migrated footer omits it. This is an OneTrust dynamic element not appropriate for static migration. All 18 other footer links present.
issues.remediation: Add cookie consent link handler in EDS scripts if required by legal/compliance.

issues.details: Source header.links.json includes 'Skip to Main Content' (accessibility skip link) and 'https://privacy.abbvie/.' (cookie-notice text), both captured by crawler as links. These are not real nav items and are absent from migrated nav. All 11 real navigation links are present.
issues.remediation: No action needed; skip links are auto-generated by EDS boilerplate.

summary: PASS — all Phase 5 configuration checks pass: GitHub files (helix-query.yaml, helix-sitemap.yaml, robots.txt, fstab.yaml) exist and YAML is valid; da.live redirects (6 entries, correct HTML table format), metadata (5 rows), nav, and footer all 200 and non-empty; rendered homepage confirms header (12 links) and footer (20 links) are NO LONGER empty/collapsed — critical regression is resolved; nav link coverage 100% real nav links, footer coverage 94.7%; head.html CSP includes p.typekit.net. Low-severity issues: header pHash visual similarity below threshold due to expected styling differences (content fully present), and Cookies Settings link intentionally omitted from footer.
